summary: Asamblea Virtual MVP testing completed. All 27 backend API tests passed. Frontend admin and resident UIs verified working correctly with all required features.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby - accessibility improvement (existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/asamblea - Admin creates assembly with agenda items: PASSED
GET /api/asamblea - Lists assemblies with attendance count: PASSED
GET /api/asamblea/{id} - Returns detail with agenda, votes, attendance, my_attendance, my_vote: PASSED
POST /api/asamblea/{id}/vote - Records vote (yes/no/abstain), one per user, updates allowed: PASSED
GET /api/asamblea/{id}/results - Returns vote tallies per agenda item: PASSED
POST /api/asamblea/{id}/generate-acta - Generates PDF with assembly info, attendance, results: PASSED
Admin page /admin/asamblea - Shows assembly list with create button: VERIFIED
Admin detail - Shows agenda with vote results, attendance list, status controls, generate acta button: VERIFIED
Resident drawer - 'Asamblea' tab enabled (not disabled): VERIFIED
Resident sees assembly list and can navigate to detail: VERIFIED
Resident can confirm attendance and vote on items: VERIFIED
Vote buttons show current user's vote (highlighted with 'Tu voto: X'): VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed assemblies during backend testing (integration workflow test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asamblea Virtual MVP fully implemented and tested. Known assembly ID: d1970935-a0ba-48d2-993d-2a11778c65d1 with 7 agenda items (6 votable), 1 attendance (resident), votes recorded. Acta generation returns PDF directly (not JSON). Vote status returns 'vote_updated' for updates. Results use 'agenda_item_id' and nested 'votes' dict structure.

backend_apis.POST /api/asamblea create assembly: PASSED - Creates assembly with agenda items
backend_apis.POST /api/asamblea create virtual with l: PASSED - Creates virtual assembly with meeting_link
backend_apis.GET /api/asamblea/{id} detail admin: PASSED - Returns full detail with agenda, attendance, votes
backend_apis.GET /api/asamblea/{id} detail resident: PASSED - Returns detail with my_attendance, my_vote
backend_apis.POST /api/asamblea/{id}/vote nonvotable: PASSED - Rejects vote on non-votable item

frontend_admin_ui.agenda_items_display: VERIFIED - 7 agenda items with vote results
frontend_admin_ui.create_dialog: VERIFIED - All form fields present (title, desc, date, modality, agenda)

frontend_resident_ui.confirm_attendance_button: VERIFIED - Shows 'Asistencia confirmada' when already confirmed
frontend_resident_ui.vote_buttons: VERIFIED - 6 sets of yes/no/abstain buttons for votable items
frontend_resident_ui.current_vote_highlighted: VERIFIED - 'Tu voto: En contra' shows user's vote
